branch_enumeration_errors.message: The available branch-search connector previously returned an empty result for a repository with known readable branches. Exhaustive branch inventory is therefore not asserted for this batch.
branch_enumeration_errors.mitigation: Record verified default-branch metadata, retain branches_scanned=false, and do not advance to duplicate/version-family classification until a trustworthy refs enumeration method is available or the limitation is explicitly resolved.

data_quality_observations.message: Repository metadata reports size 0 KB. Preserve and inspect provenance; emptiness alone is not authority to delete or archive.
